creator: 2khramtsov@gmail.com
text:
ports 67be379c96ce pushed update that doesn't match the present weekly tag:

weekly
95a38ff8 · Merge branch 'imbris/revert-some' into 'master' · 5 days ago

resulting in version mismatch error when joining server.veloren.net,
while ports 63bf4011154f mentioned the port is expected to match server.

I can probably guess that early push is intended for pkg.FreeBSD.org users,
but I submit this PR for maintainer feedback.
